abilities.name: Drawn to Pain (Mask)
abilities.description: After this character fails but before suffering damage, move distance equal to Walk speed directly toward attacker.

abilities.name: Fiery Demise
abilities.description: When killed, all characters within p2 suffer 1 damage and gain Burning +1.

abilities.name: Searing Mark
abilities.description: All characters damaged by this character gain Burning +1.

abilities.name: Sense Magic
abilities.description: When Spell cast within 30 yards, attempt Counter-Spelling Challenge (TN 20 - spell TN). On success, learn exact location and sense magical effects for duration.

actions: (1) Shattered Rune Blade (Labor) | AV: 6 (12) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Crow Drain Magic: End magical effects and heal 1 Wound per effect.
(1) Runed Pistol (Pistol) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 2. Tome Cataclysm: Gains +B to Severe damage.
(1) Dispel Magic (Counter-Spelling) | AV: 5 (11) | TN: 10 | Rg: 12 | Resist: Wp | End all magical effects and Conditions from Spells/Manifested Powers.
system.notes: Rogue mages burned by Witch Hunter Sonnia Criid. Their magic turned against themselves, creating charred hunting dogs that sense and negate magic.
